name: FASE 2 - Automated DM & Language-Aware Engagement + Sales API (v2)

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "tinyllama", "prompt": "=Analyze the following message and detect the language. Respond ONLY with the language code (e.g., 'en', 'ja', 'es', 'pt', 'de', 'fr').\n\nMessage: {{ $json.body.message || $json.body.comment_text }}", "stream": false}

{"version": "da77403487f90cbd56bcc580f124c6e9196b6bf09d8d6467362f6bcc1b90f488", "input": "={{ { 'prompt': $json.trigger_word + ', ' + $('Get Character Persona').item.json.appearance.base_description + ', looking at camera, high detail, masterpiece, 8k, bokeh background', 'negative_prompt': 'nsfw, low quality, blurry', 'width': 1024, 'height': 1024, 'num_inference_steps': 30, 'guidance_scale': 7.5 } }}"}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO dm_messages (message_id, subscriber_id, platform, message_content, nsfw_level, funnel_platforms, status, created_at)
VALUES (md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::uuid, $1, 'instagram', $2, $3, $4, 'pending_approval', NOW())
RETURNING message_id
=UPDATE dm_messages SET status = 'approved' WHERE message_id = '{{ $json.query.id }}' RETURNING *

nodes.name: Webhook (Publish to Sales APIs)
nodes.notes: Triggered from Telegram button — publica en Gumroad/Patreon/Fansly/Fanvue/itch.io según nsfw_level

nodes.name: Call SalesConnector API (5 Plataformas)
nodes.notes: Llama al endpoint REST del SalesConnector. Publica en Gumroad+Patreon+Fansly+Fanvue+itch.io según nivel NSFW.

parameters.query: UPDATE dm_messages SET status = 'published', sales_results = $1::jsonb WHERE message_id = '{{ $('Fetch DM for Sales').item.json.message_id }}'
